"On bumble we empower women to make the first move in their relationships to shift old-fashioned power dynamics and encourage equality from the start" "e·qual·i·ty noun the state of being equal, especially in status, rights, and opportunities" ONLY allowing women to message first in hetro matches creates literally the OPPOSITE of equality. Don't pay for premium....the likes you are paying to see don't like to pop up until your subscription is over... almost to get you to give them more money....had likes on free...paid premium, suddenly had no likes ...
